RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_WEIRD_E: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Trouble Maker[/card] to your hand. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn.
It always finds the perfect beat for the worst possible idea.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_SAMURAI: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Famous Blade[/card] to your hand. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn. The first time each turn you attack an enemy, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [power]Sword Aura[/power]. The first [blue]2[/blue] stacks each make your attacks deal [blue]1[/blue] extra damage. The [blue]3[/blue]rd stack makes your attacks deal [blue]2[/blue] extra damage. Maximum [blue]3[/blue] stacks.
A single slash settles the stance. The third slash settles the battle.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_SLIME_L: Lose [blue]10[/blue] Max HP. When taking damage, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [power]Half Life Heal[/power] and reduce this effect's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn. At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Healing Slime[/card] to your hand.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_BIONIC_: Gain [gold]Steps[/gold] when entering rooms. At combat start, lose [blue]1[/blue] Strength and [blue]1[/blue] Dexterity. Every [blue]13[/blue] steps gained grants [blue]1[/blue] Strength/Dexterity (alternating). Lose combat-gained Strength/Dexterity after combat ends.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_PROPRIE: When entering a shop, gain gold equal to [blue]10[/blue] times the number of shops you have entered this run. While any player has this relic, every player's shop cards, potions, relics, and card removal service each have a [blue]3[/blue]% chance to cost only [blue]30[/blue]% of their normal price. This chance increases by [blue]3[/blue]% each time you pass through a shop. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn. At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, trigger this relic's combat effect.
Business is business. Bargains are personal.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_MOUSY_L: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Mousy Save Me[/card] to your hand. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn.
A tiny rescue can still change the whole fight.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_BLUE_WH: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Weak Imprint[/card] to your hand. Defeating an enemy with [power]Weak Imprint[/power] gives you [blue]3[/blue] Gold. If combat ends exactly on turn [blue]6[/blue], gain [blue]6[/blue] Gold. Each later repeat adds [blue]2[/blue] more Gold to that reward. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn.
The future has already been decided!
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_MASCOT_: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Product Restocking[/card] to your hand. Whenever [card]Product Restocking[/card] discards a card, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold]. Every time [card]Product Restocking[/card] has drawn a cumulative total of [blue]25[/blue] cards, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] token relics you do not currently own, gain that relic's temporary combat ability, and record it in [relic]Token Memory[/relic]. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn.
A full shelf is nice. A refilled hand is better.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_OASIS_Q: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Royal Prerogative[/card] to your hand. Deal [blue]1[/blue] extra damage for each [gold]Temporary[/gold] card in your hand, up to [blue]3[/blue]. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn.
What stays, what goes, and what shines all answer to the queen.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_INK_SHA: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Shadow Fusion[/card] to your hand. At the start of your turn, apply [blue]1[/blue] [power]Twin Shadows[/power] to a random enemy. Whenever you play an Attack card that costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} to {energyPrefix:energyIcons(3)} targeting an enemy, apply [blue]1[/blue] [power]Twin Shadows[/power] to that target, up to your current [power]Shadow Quota[/power] limit each turn. Entering an Elite room gives you [blue]1[/blue] [power]Hunter's Feast[/power]. Entering a Boss room gives you [blue]3[/blue] [power]Hunter's Feast[/power]. At the end of that combat, each stack of [power]Hunter's Feast[/power] permanently increases your [power]Shadow Quota[/power] limit by [blue]1[/blue]. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn.
A small shadow is still enough to leave a mark.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSONALITY_DE: Every [blue]2[/blue] rooms, gain Gold equal to this relic's counter. [card]Transfer[/card] increases that counter by [blue]1[/blue]. This counter has no cap.
Money likes finding its way back with friends.

Record the temporary token relic abilities you have gained through [card]Product Restocking[/card] this run. When the same temporary token ability has been gained [blue]3[/blue] times, add its matching token relic to the combat reward screen after battle.
Once a popular item repeats often enough, it gets a permanent shelf slot.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_PROPRIE: Every [blue]2[/blue] rooms, gain Gold equal to this relic's counter. [card]Transfer[/card] increases that counter by [blue]1[/blue]. This counter has no cap.
Money likes finding its way back with friends.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_SUPERMA: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Orbital Bombardment[/card] to your hand. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn. At turn end, if you have fewer than [blue]5[/blue] cards in hand, draw [blue]1[/blue] extra card next turn. After playing [card]Orbital Bombardment[/card], draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
Less in hand. More from orbit.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_XIAO_LE: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Chain Reaction[/card] to your hand. Whenever you cause another player to gain a card, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Dragon Awakening[/power]. After enduring Seventy-Two Heavenly Thunders and Thirty-Six Heavenly Fires, unlock [power]True Dragon Form[/power].
No dragon crosses the gate before surviving the storm.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSONALITY_DE: At the end of combat, reduce Seventy-Two Heavenly Thunders by your [power]Dragon Awakening[/power]. Whenever you take damage, reduce Thirty-Six Heavenly Fires by [blue]1[/blue]. Once both trials reach [blue]0[/blue], at the start of each combat gain [power]True Dragon Form[/power] and add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Dragon's Roar[/card] to your hand.
The gate yields only after thunder and fire have both been spent.

Starts at [blue]0[/blue] and does not grow on its own. Every [blue]2[/blue] total [power]Sword Aura[/power] consumed by [card]Famous Blade[/card] increases this relic's counter by [blue]1[/blue]. Each time you play [card]Famous Blade[/card], deal bonus damage to the target equal to this relic's counter.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_JILL_ST: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Mixed Cocktails[/card] to your hand. If [card]Mixed Cocktails[/card] discards exactly [blue]3[/blue] cards with all different types, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold]. If it discards exactly [blue]3[/blue] cards of the same type, the target gains [blue]3[/blue] extra [green]Dexterity[/green].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_SHADOW_:
At the start of the next [blue]1[/blue] combat, all players gain [blue]1[/blue] [card]Royalties[/card].
At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Powerful Pity[/card] to your hand.
Whenever you cause any player to gain or draw a card, you and that player each gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
At combat start, for every [blue]12[/blue] stacks of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold] you have, gain [blue]1[/blue] [red]Strength[/red] and [blue]1[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green].
The strong may show mercy. The shadow only remembers the price.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_POISONE:
At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Concealing Operation[/card] to your hand.
[card]Trouble Maker[/card] temporarily includes the [gold]Concealing Investigation[/gold] event series in its pool, but [card]Deus Ex Machina[/card] never offers them.
Your Attack cards deal [blue]3[/blue] extra damage to enemies that already have [power]Mark[/power].
When a target with [power]Investigation Target[/power] is killed, it advances [gold]Investigation Progress[/gold] and triggers the matching-stage [gold]Concealing Investigation[/gold] event.
The apple is poisoned. So is the trail it leaves behind.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_MIDNIGH:
At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Unstoppable[/card] to your hand.
Whenever you kill an enemy while you have [power]Ready to Strike[/power], reduce this relic's cooldown by [blue]2[/blue].
A single flash buys the whole turn.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_CYBER_K:
At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Remote Intrusion[/card] to your hand.
At the start of your turn, if your [power]Node[/power] is above [blue]3[/blue], gain [blue]1[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red] and [blue]1[/blue] temporary [green]Dexterity[/green], then move [blue]1[/blue] Attack card from your draw pile to your hand and make it free this turn. If none is in the draw pile, take one from the discard pile instead.
After the first Attack card you play each turn, discard the leftmost Attack card in your hand and upgrade it for this combat. If you have no Attack card in hand, instead upgrade a random Attack card for this combat. If no upgradable Attack remains, upgrade a random upgradable card instead.
A firewall is only polite decoration once the cat already owns the network.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_VAMPIRE:
At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]One Little Sip[/card] to your hand.
When your HP is below [blue]50[/blue]%, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [power]Cute Is Justice[/power]; below [blue]25[/blue]%, gain [blue]1[/blue] more; below [blue]15[/blue]%, gain [blue]1[/blue] more.
When the body weakens, cuteness steps in as force.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_SOCIAL_: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Iron Virgin[/card] to your hand. At the start of each turn, apply [blue]1[/blue] [power]Boundary Reinforcement[/power].

After this relic triggers [blue]3[/blue] times, obtain [blue]1[/blue] die relic you do not have. This effect no longer triggers once the full dice set is complete.

After this relic triggers [blue]3[/blue] times, obtain [blue]1[/blue] die relic you do not have. This effect no longer triggers once the full dice set is complete.

If you end combat exactly on turn [blue]20[/blue], gain [blue]20[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold] and all start-of-next-combat effects from the other dice at the start of your next combat.
After this relic triggers [blue]3[/blue] times, obtain [blue]1[/blue] die relic you do not have. This effect no longer triggers once the full dice set is complete.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_BLUE_BAN: Gain [blue]14[/blue] stacks of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold]. If you do not have [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold], obtain it first, then add the stacks.

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_BLUE_MEM: At the start of your [blue]3[/blue]rd, [blue]6[/blue]th, [blue]9[/blue]th, and later turns, draw [blue]1[/blue] extra card.

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_PURPLE_B: Gain [blue]28[/blue] stacks of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold]. If you do not have [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold], obtain it first, then add the stacks.

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_PURPLE_M: At the start of your [blue]3[/blue]rd, [blue]6[/blue]th, [blue]9[/blue]th, and later turns, draw [blue]2[/blue] extra cards.

At combat start, gain [blue]2[/blue] stacks of [gold]Phantom Reverse Scales[/gold].

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_HAN: After you play a Persona Skill card, draw [blue]1[/blue] card and apply [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Mark[/gold] to a random enemy.
A bigger gust keeps the turn moving.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_INI: At rest sites, you can spend Gold to [gold]Ascend[/gold]: the first [blue]3[/blue] uses cost [gold]60[/gold]/[gold]90[/gold]/[gold]120[/gold] Gold and grant a random token relic (excluding special relics) plus [blue]15[/blue]% Max HP healing. After all [blue]3[/blue] ascensions are complete, the option only heals [blue]15[/blue]% Max HP.
A tiny anchor point for steadily compounding returns.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_EXCLUSIV: Trident

After you play a Persona Skill card, make [blue]1[/blue] player who does not already have [gold]Empowered Trident[/gold] gain it.
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Dreamship[/gold] note.
The prow strikes first. The rest of the crew catches up later.
Dreamship Model

At combat start, gain [blue]2[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green].
Every [blue]15[/blue] cards you play, reduce Persona relic cooldown by [blue]1[/blue].
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Dreamship[/gold] note.
Only the hull is miniature. The route is not.
Cursed Sword

At combat start, gain [blue]99[/blue] [gold]Frail[/gold].
At the start of turn [blue]1[/blue] and every multiple of [blue]3[/blue], gain [gold]Vigor[/gold] equal to this relic's counter.
Whenever you kill [blue]1[/blue] monster, this relic's counter +[blue]1[/blue].
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Spirit Festival[/gold] note.
The curse stays. So does the swing.
Vengeance Halberd

If you have defense-loss debuffs, gain [blue]5[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red].
If you have HP-loss debuffs, gain [blue]5[/blue] temporary [green]Dexterity[/green].
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Spirit Festival[/gold] note.
The worse the state, the cleaner the revenge.
Piercing Gun

Whenever your Skill cards deal damage, they also resolve the portion blocked by Block as extra damage, effectively stripping Block first.
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Spirit Festival[/gold] note.
It does not pierce armor. It refuses to acknowledge it.
Bronze Gong

After you play a Persona Skill card, all players gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Empowered Bronze Gong[/gold].
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Water Town[/gold] note.
One strike for the whole team.
Zuo Tea Cake

At combat start, gain [blue]1[/blue] [red]Strength[/red].
After being obtained, during the current act, whenever your Attack card damages a non-Elite, non-Boss enemy, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Zuo Tea Cake[/gold].
It expires next act.
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Magic Academy[/gold] note.
Sweet enough to keep the lesson moving.
Ancient Wand

All Skill cards deal [blue]+3[/blue] damage.
At combat start, Max Energy +{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Magic Academy[/gold] note.
Old wood. Very direct answers.
Boutique Sword and Shield

At combat start, gain [blue]2[/blue] [red]Strength[/red].
At the start of each turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
In Boss rooms, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Problem Student[/gold] each turn.
While you have [gold]Problem Student[/gold], gain [blue]4[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green].
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Magic Academy[/gold] note.
Expensive gear, reckless confidence.
Storm Talisman

Whenever you play a Skill card, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold].
Whenever you draw [blue]1[/blue] card, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold].
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Dragon Palace[/gold] note.
The bigger the wave, the busier the charm.
Psychedelic Seafood Soup

At the start of each turn, randomly gain either [blue]1[/blue] or [blue]6[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Dragon Palace[/gold] note.
You never quite know which bowl you got.
Little Snake Doll

Whenever you take damage, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Reverse Scales[/gold].
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Dragon Palace[/gold] note.
Quiet toy. Sharp memory.
Little Carp Doll

After you play a Persona Skill card, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Counter[/gold].
Whenever any [gold]Counter[/gold] effect triggers, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Empowered Little Carp Doll[/gold], once each turn.
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Dragon Palace[/gold] note.
Take one hit. Grow one scale.
Infinite Snake

At combat start, Max Energy +{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
At the start of each turn, if you have fewer than [blue]8[/blue] cards in hand, draw until you have [blue]8[/blue].
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Dragon Palace[/gold] note.
The hand empties. The coil comes back.
Crossed Twin Carp

At the start of each turn, gain [gold]Empowered Crossed Twin Carp[/gold].
Whenever you gain [gold]Vigor[/gold], if you do not already have [gold]Empowered Crossed Twin Carp[/gold], gain it.
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Dragon Palace[/gold] note.
They do not cross paths. They accelerate each other.
Candy Membership Card

At the start of each turn, if your hand does not contain [gold]Curious Candy Machine[/gold], add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Curious Candy Machine[/gold] to your hand.
This relic also grants the [gold]Ghost Alley Series[/gold] note.
The card proves the machine is always open for business.
Timer

Whenever you gain [gold]Modification[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] extra stack. For every [blue]2[/blue] stacks of [gold]Modification[/gold] you have, gain [blue]1[/blue] [red]Strength[/red].
This relic also grants the [gold]Ghost Alley Series[/gold] effect.
Every tick makes the price a little closer.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_NINJA.d: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Ninjutsu Combo[/card] to your hand. At the start of combat and at the start of each of your turns, set [power]Copy Quota[/power] to [blue]9[/blue]. Whenever you play your [blue]3[/blue]rd, [blue]6[/blue]th, [blue]9[/blue]th, and later Skill card each turn, if [power]Copy Quota[/power] remains, copy the most recently played non-persona Skill card into your hand and give it [exhaust]Exhaust[/exhaust].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_NINJA.f: Every cut leaves room for one more trick.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSONALITY_DE: Starts with [blue]1[/blue] stack. At combat start, gain [power]Esoteric Empower[/power] equal to this relic's stacks. Every [blue]6[/blue] Skill cards with current resolved cost [blue]1[/blue] or higher you play in combat reduce [relic]Persona: Ninja[/relic]'s cooldown by [blue]1[/blue]. Every [blue]9[/blue] Skill cards with current resolved cost [blue]1[/blue] or higher you play in combat permanently increase this relic's stacks by [blue]1[/blue].
The knot tightens a little more every time the sequence completes.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_ARC: Once each turn, when you play your [blue]3[/blue]rd Skill card, copy that Skill card, give it [exhaust]Exhaust[/exhaust], add it to your hand, and make it free this turn. This relic shows how many Skill cards you have played toward that trigger this turn.
The third notation is where the spell starts repeating itself.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_ZHAO.de: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Invoke Spirits[/card] to your hand. At combat start, gain [power]Extra Attack[/power]. Whenever you or the current [power]Invoke Spirits[/power] target play Attack cards, accumulate their actual cost; every [blue]2[/blue] total cost grants [blue]1[/blue] [power]Foxfire[/power].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_ZHAO.fl: When the spirit descends, every strike echoes twice.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_UNCLE_P: At the start of every 3rd turn, add 1 [card]Really Angry![/card] to your hand. At the start of your turn, refresh [power]Node[/power] to a value from 1 to 6, then gain random swings of -2 to +2 temporary Strength, temporary Dexterity, Vigor, Block, and Energy. If Node is 6, your Attack cards are Unblockable this turn. If Node is 1, next turn's Node is forced to 6.
He never has a small reaction.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_FENG.de: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Channel Energy[/card] to your hand. At combat start, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Gathering Strength[/power]. If you played no Attack cards this turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Gathering Strength[/power] at end of turn, or [blue]2[/blue] in Elite and Boss rooms. Whenever you play an Attack card, lose [blue]1[/blue] [power]Gathering Strength[/power]; if you had exactly [blue]5[/blue] beforehand, lose [blue]2[/blue] additional stacks and deal the same actual damage to all other enemies.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_FENG.fl: The calmer the preparation, the harder the release lands.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_DEITY_L: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Survey Finds[/power]. At combat start, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Living Folio[/card] to your hand. While [card]Living Folio[/card]'s permanent damage bonus is [blue]0-11[/blue], each consumed stack of [relic]Persona Derivative: Living Folio[/relic] permanently increases its base damage by [blue]1[/blue] and reduces its Energy cost by [blue]1[/blue]. While its permanent damage bonus is [blue]12-22[/blue], it gains [blue]1[/blue] permanent base damage for every [blue]2[/blue] stacks consumed. While its permanent damage bonus is [blue]23+[/blue], it gains [blue]1[/blue] permanent base damage for every [blue]3[/blue] stacks consumed.
Every page turned leaves the next clue sharper than the last.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_KAWAII_: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Cyber Angel[/card] to your hand. When an enemy attacks you and deals unblocked damage, it gains [blue]1[/blue] [power]Fan[/power]. When an enemy takes unblocked damage from you or [relic]Persona: Needy Girl[/relic], it gains [blue]1[/blue] [power]Fan[/power].
Attention from the far side of the screen can still become force in the real fight.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_NEEDY_G: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Emotional Overdose[/card] to your hand. At combat start, gain [blue]2[/blue] [power]Love[/power]. Whenever you or [relic]Persona: KAngel[/relic] take unblocked damage, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Love[/power].
The more attention it gets, the more desperately it wants to be needed.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_PANDA_M: When obtained, gain Max HP equal to [blue]40[/blue]% of your current HP, rounded up, then heal that much. At combat start, lose [blue]1[/blue] [red]Strength[/red] and [blue]1[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green]. At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Big Eater[/card] to your hand. Whenever you gain [power]Regeneration[/power] or [power]Half Life Heal[/power] during combat, each other ally gains [blue]2[/blue] of the same power.
Eat first. Then make sure the whole team stays full.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_JUNK_BO: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Come Here, You[/card] to your hand. At the start of each act, mark [blue]16[/blue] combats. When you kill an enemy during a marked combat, reduce this relic's cooldown by [blue]2[/blue]. Every [blue]2[/blue] marked-combat kills, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [relic]Persona Derivative: Z3000 Weapon Frame[/relic].
If it looks like junk long enough, people stop expecting the artillery.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSONALITY_DE: Whenever you eat [card]Chocolate Cake[/card] or [card]Hamburger[/card], gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Counter[/power]. If it was [card]Hamburger[/card], permanently gain [blue]2[/blue] Max HP and heal [blue]2[/blue]. Whenever a relic grants you Max HP, gain an additional [blue]40[/blue]% of that amount, rounded up. Your [power]Counter[/power] deals bonus damage equal to the sum of all current enemy attack intents.
A bigger appetite makes for a meaner answer back.

Starts at [blue]0[/blue] stacks. At combat start, gain [red]Strength[/red] equal to this relic's stacks. While this relic has more than [blue]6[/blue] stacks, whenever one of your Attack cards deals unblocked damage to an enemy, that enemy loses [blue]1[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green].
Once the frame is stable, the rest is just mounting heavier parts.

Starts with [blue]1[/blue] stack and caps at [blue]9[/blue]. Whenever you enter an Event room, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack. Whenever you play an Event card, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack; [card]Trouble Maker[/card] does not count.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_TOPBAR_OPEN_TOKEN_SE: Open token series have not been initialized for this run yet.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PACK_RANDOM_TO: When picked up, obtain a random token relic that is not part of any series. Blue/Purple/Gold odds: [blue]60[/blue]%/[blue]30[/blue]%/[blue]10[/blue]%.
Open first. Pretend luck was guaranteed later.
When picked up, obtain a random token relic that is not part of any series. Blue/Purple/Gold odds: [blue]40[/blue]%/[blue]40[/blue]%/[blue]20[/blue]%.
A middle-tier bet with respectable upside.
When picked up, obtain a random token relic that is not part of any series. Blue/Purple/Gold odds: [blue]20[/blue]%/[blue]50[/blue]%/[blue]30[/blue]%.
The better the pack, the shakier the hands.
